_comment: AF option GAIN name -> part-slug, for loadout->variant model resolution (Handover I2, rules v1.1). Match on the option's GAIN name (weapon or rule), NOT the Army-Forge display label (labels carry stats text that changes). Only API-recognizable, NON-default choices are slugs: a replaced weapon (Spear/Halberd/...) and a per-model role (Sergeant/Banner/Musician). The default hand weapon, shields (visual dressing), and Combined-Unit (size only) produce NO slug. Values are Model Forge's baked-variant vocabulary; Model Forge reproduces ModelLibrary.variant_slug (sorted, de-duplicated slugs joined by '+') when naming a variant bake '<baseKey>#<slug>'. Keys matched case-insensitively against a model's distributed loadout item names (= the gain names post-parse).
